privileged_info_summary: The task involves creating a Moodle glossary activity in course BIO101 with the name 'Medical Terminology Glossary' and three verified real biological terms: Mitochondria (membrane-bound organelles generating ATP), Homeostasis (tendency to maintain constant internal conditions), and Pathogen (biological agent causing disease). All provided definitions match real biological definitions from authoritative sources (NCBI, genome.gov, Britannica, medical textbooks). All specified keywords are present in the provided definitions. The course name, glossary name, and task scenario are synthetic/task-specific, but the biological concepts and definitions are based on real scientific knowledge.
